findings.message: Agent description length 73 chars is outside the 80–400 band. Too short → ambiguous routing; too long → wastes routing context.

evidence.value: Engineer that helps the team build features and fix bugs across services.

findings.fix: Aim for one or two sentences with both WHAT and WHEN.

findings.message: Description does not contain a "use when" / "use proactively" / "MUST BE USED" trigger phrase, so the orchestrator may under-delegate.
findings.fix: Add e.g. "Use immediately after writing or modifying code."

findings.message: `Agent` is granted but the agent does not look like an orchestrator. Sub-agents cannot dispatch other sub-agents anyway.
findings.fix: Drop `Agent` from the tool list unless this agent delegates to others.

findings.message: Body has no "When invoked" / procedure / workflow heading.
findings.fix: Add a numbered "## When invoked" section listing the agent's procedure.

findings.message: Body has no constraints / guardrails / anti-patterns section.
findings.fix: Add a "## Constraints" section listing what the agent must NOT do.
